segments.text: And, behold, there came a man of God out of Judah by the word of the LORD unto Beth-el:
and Jeroboam stood by the altar to burn incense.

O altar, altar, thus saith the LORD; Behold, a child shall be born unto the house of David, Josiah by name; and upon thee shall he offer the priests of the high places that burn incense upon thee, and men's bones shall be burnt upon thee.
segments.speaker: Man of God

segments.text: This is the sign which the LORD hath spoken; Behold, the altar shall be rent, and the ashes that are upon it shall be poured out.
segments.speaker: Man of God

segments.text: And it came to pass, when king Jeroboam heard the saying of the man of God, which had cried against the altar in Beth-el,
Lay hold on him.
segments.speaker: Jeroboam

segments.text: And his hand, which he put forth against him, dried up, so that he could not pull it in again to him.
The altar also was rent, and the ashes poured out from the altar, according to the sign which the man of God had given by the word of the LORD.
Intreat now the face of the LORD thy God, and pray for me, that my hand may be restored me again.
segments.speaker: Jeroboam

segments.text: And the man of God besought the LORD, and the king's hand was restored him again, and became as it was before.

footnotes: the LORD, and: Heb. the face of the LORD, etc

segments.text: Come home with me, and refresh thyself, and I will give thee a reward.
segments.speaker: Jeroboam

segments.text: If thou wilt give me half thine house, I will not go in with thee, neither will I eat bread nor drink water in this place:
segments.speaker: Man of God

segments.text: For so was it charged me by the word of the LORD, saying, Eat no bread, nor drink water, nor turn again by the same way that thou camest.
So he went another way, and returned not by the way that he came to Beth-el.

Now there dwelt an old prophet in Beth-el; and his sons came and told him all the works that the man of God had done that day in Beth-el: the words which he had spoken unto the king, them they told also to their father.
What way went he? For his sons had seen what way the man of God went, which came from Judah.
segments.speaker: Old Prophet

segments.text: Saddle me the ass.
segments.speaker: Old Prophet

segments.text: So they saddled him the ass: and he rode thereon,
And went after the man of God, and found him sitting under an oak:
Art thou the man of God that camest from Judah?
segments.speaker: Old Prophet

segments.text: I am.
segments.speaker: Man of God

segments.text: Come home with me, and eat bread.
segments.speaker: Old Prophet

segments.text: I may not return with thee, nor go in with thee: neither will I eat bread nor drink water with thee in this place:
segments.speaker: Man of God

segments.text: For it was said to me by the word of the LORD, Thou shalt eat no bread nor drink water there, nor turn again to go by the way that thou camest.
I am a prophet also as thou art; and an angel spake unto me by the word of the LORD, saying, Bring him back with thee into thine house, that he may eat bread and drink water.
segments.speaker: Old Prophet

segments.text: But he lied unto him.
So he went back with him, and did eat bread in his house, and drank water.
And it came to pass, as they sat at the table, that the word of the LORD came unto the prophet that brought him back:
Thus saith the LORD, Forasmuch as thou hast disobeyed the mouth of the LORD, and hast not kept the commandment which the LORD thy God commanded thee,
segments.speaker: Old Prophet

segments.text: But camest back, and hast eaten bread and drunk water in the place, of the which the Lord did say to thee, Eat no bread, and drink no water; thy carcase shall not come unto the sepulchre of thy fathers.
segments.speaker: Old Prophet

segments.text: After this thing Jeroboam returned not from his evil way, but made again of the lowest of the people priests of the high places: whosoever would, he consecrated him, and he became one of the priests of the high places.
And this thing became sin unto the house of Jeroboam, even to cut it off, and to destroy it from off the face of the earth.
